data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"schema_version":2,"epicId":"4931-f639","generatedAt":"2026-04-24T01:40:23.900846Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Ticket system validation classify-task.py (no LLM); the poetry environment resolution requirement is documented"]},"researchFindings":[],"stories":[{"id":"1511-2e47","title":"As a developer, I can validate ticket health via
